description: Graphic on a dark navy-blue background faintly watermarked with the DOL seal. At the top, in a large white serif headline, reads 'Skilled Trades BOOM!'. Below the headline are four stacked white torn-paper-style clippings, each topped with a news outlet logo bar and a headline in bold black serif type. Top to bottom they read: '3 NEWS' - 'High school students turn to trade schools amid rising college costs'; 'CBS NEWS' (black bar with the CBS eye) - 'More North Texas students are turning to trade schools for faster, affordable career paths: Accepted'; '41 KSHB' - 'Graduation season brings increased interest in trade schools'; and 'The Salt Lake Tribune' - 'From debt to dollars: Gen Z shifts from college loans to skilled trades'.
notable_text: Skilled Trades BOOM! | High school students turn to trade schools amid rising college costs | More North Texas students are turning to trade schools for faster, affordable career paths | Graduation season brings increased interest in trade schools | From debt to dollars: Gen Z shifts from college loans to skilled trades
